name: Camera Angles

critical_rules: Panel 2 shows the character's right side to the camera. Panel 3 shows the character's left side to the camera. Panels 2 and 3 must be true opposite side views, not duplicated and not mirrored versions of the same side.
Both shoes fully visible in every panel.
Panel 7 shows a true side profile of the character — one specific body side facing the camera, not a three-quarter substitute and not a mirrored reuse of another panel.
Both shoes fully visible in every panel where full-body framing applies.

Panel 6 shows the character's right side to the camera. Panel 7 shows the character's left side to the camera. Panels 6 and 7 must be true opposite side views, not duplicated and not mirrored versions of the same side.
Both shoes fully visible in every panel where full-body framing applies.

visibility_clauses.uniform_full_body: Entire figure fully visible in all panels.
visibility_clauses.mixed: Entire figure fully visible where full-body framing applies.

pose: Natural relaxed stance. Consistent posture across all panels where the body is visible.

locked.dual_or_triple_ref: Same facial identity, body proportions, hairstyle, outfit, colors, materials, and consistent lighting source and mood across all panels.
locked.single_ref: Same facial identity, body proportions, hairstyle, outfit, colors, materials, and consistent lighting source and mood across all panels, matching the reference image.

forbidden_entries: No cropped head, no cropped feet, no hidden footwear.
